home.eyebrow: FOR EVERY FAMILY · FOR EVERY GENERATION
home.subtitle: Capture the voices, stories, and faces of everyone you love — so that a century from now, your great-grandchildren will know exactly who you were.

auth.title: Begin your family's legacy
auth.subtitle: Create your private archive — or sign back in. Your family's stories are protected and yours alone.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a link to begin.
auth.guarantee: Your archive is private. Only the family you invite can ever see it.

region.title: Where is your family from?
region.subtitle: We'll suggest the languages spoken there — but every language stays open to you.
